examples.text: of the world fills many of us with doom, hopelessness and sadness. We feel it too. It is one of the most pervasive stories of our time and there is a lot of truth to it. But as Terry Pratchett said, we are the storytelling ape, we think in narratives and live in a network of stories that make up our world. So without minimising the darkness, we want to add a story that we find helpful for dealing with the world.
examples.explanation: 这里的 narratives 是 narrative 的复数，表示“叙事、故事框架、我们理解世界的说法”。句子意思是：人类会通过各种“叙事”来思考，并生活在由许多故事构成的世界中。该词在这里不是单指文学作品，而是指人们解释现实、组织经验的整体说法。

reviewSessions.example_text: of the world fills many of us with doom, hopelessness and sadness. We feel it too. It is one of the most pervasive stories of our time and there is a lot of truth to it. But as Terry Pratchett said, we are the storytelling ape, we think in narratives and live in a network of stories that make up our world. So without minimising the darkness, we want to add a story that we find helpful for dealing with the world.
reviewSessions.feedback: “方向”与 narrative 在语境中的“叙事/故事线/叙述框架”关联很弱，基本不准确。

reviewSessions.example_text: of the world fills many of us with doom, hopelessness and sadness. We feel it too. It is one of the most pervasive stories of our time and there is a lot of truth to it. But as Terry Pratchett said, we are the storytelling ape, we think in narratives and live in a network of stories that make up our world. So without minimising the darkness, we want to add a story that we find helpful for dealing with the world.
reviewSessions.feedback: 答案准确，抓住了核心含义。
matched_points: 符合语境中 narratives 表示故事/叙事框架的意思
